title: Knowledge Index
description: Queryable index over confirmed research briefs in .agents/research/. Regenerated by scripts/indexing/build-knowledge-index.sh from front-matter in each brief. Never hand-edited except to fix a bad tag.

topic.description: Short human-readable topic, matches the brief's front-matter.

tags.description: Lowercase keywords used for task-keyword matching in research-integration.md.

brief_path.description: Path to the full brief, relative to repo root, e.g. .agents/research/guitar-tab-rendering.md

summary.description: 1-2 sentence recommendation, not the full brief. Read the brief_path for reasoning/sources.
